if.test: c_name != null and c_name != '' and c_name != 'all'

choose.when: f.F_CATAGORY2
f.F_CATAGORY3
f.F_CATAGORY4
f.F_CATAGORY5

when.test: startDate != null and startDate != '' or endDate != null and endDate != ''

choose.when: AND c.CART_PAYDATE >= TRUNC(SYSDATE) AND c.CART_PAYDATE < TRUNC(SYSDATE) + 1
AND c.CART_PAYDATE >= TRUNC(SYSDATE, 'IW') AND c.CART_PAYDATE < TRUNC(SYSDATE, 'IW') + 7
AND c.CART_PAYDATE >= TRUNC(SYSDATE, 'MM') AND c.CART_PAYDATE < ADD_MONTHS(TRUNC(SYSDATE, 'MM'), 1)
AND c.CART_PAYDATE >= TRUNC(SYSDATE, 'YYYY') AND c.CART_PAYDATE < ADD_MONTHS(TRUNC(SYSDATE, 'YYYY'), 12)

when.test: startDate != null and startDate != '' or endDate != null and endDate != ''

choose.when: AND c.CART_CREATEDDATE >= TRUNC(SYSDATE) AND c.CART_CREATEDDATE < TRUNC(SYSDATE) + 1
AND c.CART_CREATEDDATE >= TRUNC(SYSDATE, 'IW') AND c.CART_CREATEDDATE < TRUNC(SYSDATE, 'IW') + 7
AND c.CART_CREATEDDATE >= TRUNC(SYSDATE, 'MM') AND c.CART_CREATEDDATE < ADD_MONTHS(TRUNC(SYSDATE, 'MM'), 1)
AND c.CART_CREATEDDATE >= TRUNC(SYSDATE, 'YYYY') AND c.CART_CREATEDDATE < ADD_MONTHS(TRUNC(SYSDATE, 'YYYY'), 12)

when.test: startDate != null and startDate != '' or endDate != null and endDate != ''

choose.when: AND c.CART_STATUSDATE >= TRUNC(SYSDATE) AND c.CART_STATUSDATE < TRUNC(SYSDATE) + 1
AND c.CART_STATUSDATE >= TRUNC(SYSDATE, 'IW') AND c.CART_STATUSDATE < TRUNC(SYSDATE, 'IW') + 7
AND c.CART_STATUSDATE >= TRUNC(SYSDATE, 'MM') AND c.CART_STATUSDATE < ADD_MONTHS(TRUNC(SYSDATE, 'MM'), 1)
AND c.CART_STATUSDATE >= TRUNC(SYSDATE, 'YYYY') AND c.CART_STATUSDATE < ADD_MONTHS(TRUNC(SYSDATE, 'YYYY'), 12)

when.test: startDate != null and startDate != '' or endDate != null and endDate != ''

choose.when: AND q.Q_CREATEDDATE >= TRUNC(SYSDATE) AND q.Q_CREATEDDATE < TRUNC(SYSDATE) + 1
AND q.Q_CREATEDDATE >= TRUNC(SYSDATE, 'IW') AND q.Q_CREATEDDATE < TRUNC(SYSDATE, 'IW') + 7
AND q.Q_CREATEDDATE >= TRUNC(SYSDATE, 'MM') AND q.Q_CREATEDDATE < ADD_MONTHS(TRUNC(SYSDATE, 'MM'), 1)
AND q.Q_CREATEDDATE >= TRUNC(SYSDATE, 'YYYY') AND q.Q_CREATEDDATE < ADD_MONTHS(TRUNC(SYSDATE, 'YYYY'), 12)

when.test: startDate != null and startDate != '' or endDate != null and endDate != ''

choose.when: AND r.FR_CREATEDDATE >= TRUNC(SYSDATE) AND r.FR_CREATEDDATE < TRUNC(SYSDATE) + 1
AND r.FR_CREATEDDATE >= TRUNC(SYSDATE, 'IW') AND r.FR_CREATEDDATE < TRUNC(SYSDATE, 'IW') + 7
AND r.FR_CREATEDDATE >= TRUNC(SYSDATE, 'MM') AND r.FR_CREATEDDATE < ADD_MONTHS(TRUNC(SYSDATE, 'MM'), 1)
AND r.FR_CREATEDDATE >= TRUNC(SYSDATE, 'YYYY') AND r.FR_CREATEDDATE < ADD_MONTHS(TRUNC(SYSDATE, 'YYYY'), 12)

when.test: startDate != null and startDate != '' or endDate != null and endDate != ''

choose.when: AND f.F_CREATEDDATE >= TRUNC(SYSDATE) AND f.F_CREATEDDATE < TRUNC(SYSDATE) + 1
AND f.F_CREATEDDATE >= TRUNC(SYSDATE, 'IW') AND f.F_CREATEDDATE < TRUNC(SYSDATE, 'IW') + 7
AND f.F_CREATEDDATE >= TRUNC(SYSDATE, 'MM') AND f.F_CREATEDDATE < ADD_MONTHS(TRUNC(SYSDATE, 'MM'), 1)
AND f.F_CREATEDDATE >= TRUNC(SYSDATE, 'YYYY') AND f.F_CREATEDDATE < ADD_MONTHS(TRUNC(SYSDATE, 'YYYY'), 12)

when.test: startDate != null and startDate != '' or endDate != null and endDate != ''

choose.when: AND oc.CLAIM_CREATEDDATE >= TRUNC(SYSDATE) AND oc.CLAIM_CREATEDDATE < TRUNC(SYSDATE) + 1
AND oc.CLAIM_CREATEDDATE >= TRUNC(SYSDATE, 'IW') AND oc.CLAIM_CREATEDDATE < TRUNC(SYSDATE, 'IW') + 7
AND oc.CLAIM_CREATEDDATE >= TRUNC(SYSDATE, 'MM') AND oc.CLAIM_CREATEDDATE < ADD_MONTHS(TRUNC(SYSDATE, 'MM'), 1)
AND oc.CLAIM_CREATEDDATE >= TRUNC(SYSDATE, 'YYYY') AND oc.CLAIM_CREATEDDATE < ADD_MONTHS(TRUNC(SYSDATE, 'YYYY'), 12)

mapper.select:
WITH ORDER_AGE_BASE AS ( SELECT u.GENDER, TRUNC(MONTHS_BETWEEN(SYSDATE, u.BIRTH) / 12) AS AGE FROM CART c JOIN USERS u ON c.ID = u.ID JOIN FURNITURE f ON c.F_CODE = f.F_CODE
) SELECT COUNT(CASE WHEN GENDER = 'male' THEN 1 END) AS "male", COUNT(CASE WHEN GENDER = 'female' THEN 1 END) AS "female", COUNT(CASE WHEN AGE BETWEEN 10 AND 19 THEN 1 END) AS "age10", COUNT(CASE WHEN AGE BETWEEN 20 AND 29 THEN 1 END) AS "age20", COUNT(CASE WHEN AGE BETWEEN 30 AND 39 THEN 1 END) AS "age30", COUNT(CASE WHEN AGE BETWEEN 40 AND 49 THEN 1 END) AS "age40", COUNT(CASE WHEN AGE BETWEEN 50 AND 59 THEN 1 END) AS "age50", COUNT(CASE WHEN AGE >= 60 THEN 1 END) AS "ageOver60", COUNT(*) AS "totalOrder" FROM ORDER_AGE_BASE

WITH BUYER_BASE AS ( SELECT DISTINCT u.ID, u.GENDER, u.BIRTH FROM CART c JOIN USERS u ON c.ID = u.ID JOIN FURNITURE f ON c.F_CODE = f.F_CODE
), AGE_BASE AS ( SELECT ID, GENDER, TRUNC(MONTHS_BETWEEN(SYSDATE, BIRTH) / 12) AS AGE FROM BUYER_BASE ) SELECT COUNT(CASE WHEN GENDER = 'male' THEN 1 END) AS "male", COUNT(CASE WHEN GENDER = 'female' THEN 1 END) AS "female", COUNT(CASE WHEN AGE BETWEEN 10 AND 19 THEN 1 END) AS "age10", COUNT(CASE WHEN AGE BETWEEN 20 AND 29 THEN 1 END) AS "age20", COUNT(CASE WHEN AGE BETWEEN 30 AND 39 THEN 1 END) AS "age30", COUNT(CASE WHEN AGE BETWEEN 40 AND 49 THEN 1 END) AS "age40", COUNT(CASE WHEN AGE BETWEEN 50 AND 59 THEN 1 END) AS "age50", COUNT(CASE WHEN AGE >= 60 THEN 1 END) AS "ageOver60", COUNT(*) AS "totalBuyer" FROM AGE_BASE

WITH HOURS AS ( SELECT LPAD(LEVEL - 1, 2, '0') AS HOUR FROM DUAL CONNECT BY LEVEL <= 24 ), CART_STATS AS ( SELECT TO_CHAR(c.CART_CREATEDDATE, 'HH24') AS HOUR, COUNT(*) AS CART_COUNT FROM CART c JOIN FURNITURE f ON c.F_CODE = f.F_CODE
c.CART_CREATEDDATE IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY TO_CHAR(c.CART_CREATEDDATE, 'HH24') ) SELECT h.HOUR AS "hour", NVL(s.CART_COUNT, 0) AS "cartCount" FROM HOURS h LEFT JOIN CART_STATS s ON h.HOUR = s.HOUR ORDER BY h.HOUR

SELECT COUNT(*) AS "totalProductCount", COUNT(CASE WHEN f.F_COUNT <= 0 THEN 1 END) AS "soldOutCount", COUNT(CASE WHEN f.F_COUNT > 0 AND f.F_COUNT <= 5 THEN 1 END) AS "lowStockCount", COUNT(CASE WHEN f.F_COUNT > 0 THEN 1 END) AS "inStockCount", NVL(ROUND(AVG(f.F_PRICE), 0), 0) AS "avgPrice", NVL(MIN(f.F_PRICE), 0) AS "minPrice", NVL(MAX(f.F_PRICE), 0) AS "maxPrice", NVL(ROUND(AVG(NVL(f.F_DISCOUNT, 0)), 2), 0) AS "avgDiscount", NVL(SUM(NVL(f.F_COUNT, 0)), 0) AS "totalStockCount", NVL(SUM(NVL(f.F_VIEWCOUNT, 0)), 0) AS "totalViewCount" FROM FURNITURE f

WITH CART_SUMMARY AS ( SELECT c.F_CODE, COUNT(*) AS CART_COUNT FROM CART c JOIN FURNITURE f ON c.F_CODE = f.F_CODE
c.CART_CREATEDDATE IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY c.F_CODE ), ORDER_SUMMARY AS ( SELECT c.F_CODE, COUNT(CASE WHEN c.F_STATUS = 'Y' THEN 1 END) AS PAY_COUNT, COUNT(CASE WHEN c.F_DSTATUS = 5 THEN 1 END) AS CONFIRM_COUNT, COUNT(CASE WHEN c.F_DSTATUS = -1 THEN 1 END) AS CANCEL_COUNT, SUM(CASE WHEN c.F_STATUS = 'Y' THEN NVL(c.F_COUNT, 0) ELSE 0 END) AS SALE_QTY, ROUND(AVG(CASE WHEN c.F_STATUS = 'Y' THEN c.F_COUNT END), 2) AS AVG_ORDER_QTY FROM CART c JOIN FURNITURE f ON c.F_CODE = f.F_CODE
GROUP BY c.F_CODE ) SELECT f.F_CODE AS "fCode", f.F_NAME AS "fName", f.F_PRICE AS "fPrice", f.F_COUNT AS "stockCount", NVL(cs.CART_COUNT, 0) AS "cartCount", NVL(os.PAY_COUNT, 0) AS "payCount", NVL(os.CONFIRM_COUNT, 0) AS "confirmCount", NVL(os.CANCEL_COUNT, 0) AS "cancelCount", NVL(os.SALE_QTY, 0) AS "saleQty", NVL(os.AVG_ORDER_QTY, 0) AS "avgOrderQty" FROM FURNITURE f LEFT JOIN CART_SUMMARY cs ON f.F_CODE = cs.F_CODE LEFT JOIN ORDER_SUMMARY os ON f.F_CODE = os.F_CODE
ORDER BY "saleQty" DESC, "payCount" DESC

WITH SALES_SUMMARY AS ( SELECT c.F_CODE, COUNT(CASE WHEN c.F_STATUS = 'Y' THEN 1 END) AS PAY_COUNT, SUM(CASE WHEN c.F_STATUS = 'Y' THEN NVL(c.F_COUNT, 0) ELSE 0 END) AS SALE_QTY, SUM(CASE WHEN c.F_STATUS = 'Y' THEN NVL(c.PAY_TOTAL, 0) ELSE 0 END) AS TOTAL_PAY_AMOUNT, SUM(CASE WHEN c.F_STATUS = 'Y' THEN NVL(c.F_PRICE, 0) ELSE 0 END) AS TOTAL_PRODUCT_AMOUNT, SUM(CASE WHEN c.F_STATUS = 'Y' THEN NVL(c.USE_POINT, 0) ELSE 0 END) AS TOTAL_USE_POINT, SUM(CASE WHEN c.F_STATUS = 'Y' THEN NVL(c.SAVE_POINT, 0) ELSE 0 END) AS TOTAL_SAVE_POINT, SUM(CASE WHEN c.F_STATUS = 'Y' THEN NVL(c.COUPON_DISCOUNT, 0) ELSE 0 END) AS TOTAL_COUPON_DISCOUNT, ROUND(AVG(CASE WHEN c.F_STATUS = 'Y' THEN c.PAY_TOTAL END), 0) AS AVG_PAY_AMOUNT FROM CART c JOIN FURNITURE f ON c.F_CODE = f.F_CODE
GROUP BY c.F_CODE ) SELECT f.F_CODE AS "fCode", f.F_NAME AS "fName", NVL(ss.PAY_COUNT, 0) AS "payCount", NVL(ss.SALE_QTY, 0) AS "saleQty", NVL(ss.TOTAL_PAY_AMOUNT, 0) AS "totalPayAmount", NVL(ss.TOTAL_PRODUCT_AMOUNT, 0) AS "totalProductAmount", NVL(ss.TOTAL_USE_POINT, 0) AS "totalUsePoint", NVL(ss.TOTAL_SAVE_POINT, 0) AS "totalSavePoint", NVL(ss.TOTAL_COUPON_DISCOUNT, 0) AS "totalCouponDiscount", NVL(ss.AVG_PAY_AMOUNT, 0) AS "avgPayAmount" FROM FURNITURE f LEFT JOIN SALES_SUMMARY ss ON f.F_CODE = ss.F_CODE
ORDER BY "totalPayAmount" DESC

WITH CART_SUMMARY AS ( SELECT c.F_CODE, COUNT(*) AS CART_COUNT FROM CART c JOIN FURNITURE f ON c.F_CODE = f.F_CODE
c.CART_CREATEDDATE IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY c.F_CODE ), PAY_SUMMARY AS ( SELECT c.F_CODE, COUNT(*) AS PAY_COUNT FROM CART c JOIN FURNITURE f ON c.F_CODE = f.F_CODE
c.F_STATUS = 'Y'
GROUP BY c.F_CODE ), LIKE_SUMMARY AS ( SELECT l.LIKE_CODE AS F_CODE, COUNT(*) AS LIKE_COUNT FROM "LIKE" l WHERE l.LIKE_TAG = 'furniture' GROUP BY l.LIKE_CODE ), QUESTION_SUMMARY AS ( SELECT q.F_CODE, COUNT(*) AS QUESTION_COUNT FROM QUESTION q JOIN FURNITURE f ON q.F_CODE = f.F_CODE
q.F_CODE IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY q.F_CODE ) SELECT f.F_CODE AS "fCode", f.F_NAME AS "fName", NVL(f.F_VIEWCOUNT, 0) AS "viewCount", NVL(ls.LIKE_COUNT, 0) AS "likeCount", NVL(qs.QUESTION_COUNT, 0) AS "questionCount", NVL(cs.CART_COUNT, 0) AS "cartCount", NVL(ps.PAY_COUNT, 0) AS "payCount", CASE WHEN NVL(f.F_VIEWCOUNT, 0) = 0 THEN 0 ELSE ROUND(NVL(cs.CART_COUNT, 0) / f.F_VIEWCOUNT * 100, 2) END AS "cartConversionRate", CASE WHEN NVL(f.F_VIEWCOUNT, 0) = 0 THEN 0 ELSE ROUND(NVL(ps.PAY_COUNT, 0) / f.F_VIEWCOUNT * 100, 2) END AS "payConversionRate", CASE WHEN NVL(ls.LIKE_COUNT, 0) = 0 THEN 0 ELSE ROUND(NVL(ps.PAY_COUNT, 0) / ls.LIKE_COUNT * 100, 2) END AS "likeToPayRate" FROM FURNITURE f LEFT JOIN CART_SUMMARY cs ON f.F_CODE = cs.F_CODE LEFT JOIN PAY_SUMMARY ps ON f.F_CODE = ps.F_CODE LEFT JOIN LIKE_SUMMARY ls ON f.F_CODE = ls.F_CODE LEFT JOIN QUESTION_SUMMARY qs ON f.F_CODE = qs.F_CODE
ORDER BY "payConversionRate" DESC

WITH REVIEW_SUMMARY AS ( SELECT r.F_CODE, COUNT(*) AS REVIEW_COUNT, ROUND(AVG(TO_NUMBER(r.FR_STAR)), 2) AS AVG_STAR, MAX(TO_NUMBER(r.FR_STAR)) AS MAX_STAR, MIN(TO_NUMBER(r.FR_STAR)) AS MIN_STAR FROM F_REVIEW r JOIN FURNITURE f ON r.F_CODE = f.F_CODE
r.FR_IDX > 0
GROUP BY r.F_CODE ), BUY_SUMMARY AS ( SELECT c.F_CODE, COUNT(*) AS CONFIRM_COUNT FROM CART c JOIN FURNITURE f ON c.F_CODE = f.F_CODE
c.F_DSTATUS = 5
GROUP BY c.F_CODE ) SELECT f.F_CODE AS "fCode", f.F_NAME AS "fName", NVL(rs.REVIEW_COUNT, 0) AS "reviewCount", NVL(rs.AVG_STAR, 0) AS "avgStar", NVL(rs.MAX_STAR, 0) AS "maxStar", NVL(rs.MIN_STAR, 0) AS "minStar", NVL(bs.CONFIRM_COUNT, 0) AS "confirmCount", CASE WHEN NVL(bs.CONFIRM_COUNT, 0) = 0 THEN 0 ELSE ROUND(NVL(rs.REVIEW_COUNT, 0) / bs.CONFIRM_COUNT * 100, 2) END AS "reviewWriteRate" FROM FURNITURE f LEFT JOIN REVIEW_SUMMARY rs ON f.F_CODE = rs.F_CODE LEFT JOIN BUY_SUMMARY bs ON f.F_CODE = bs.F_CODE
ORDER BY "avgStar" DESC, "reviewCount" DESC

WITH QUESTION_SUMMARY AS ( SELECT q.F_CODE, COUNT(*) AS QUESTION_COUNT, COUNT(CASE WHEN q.Q_STATUS = 'done' THEN 1 END) AS DONE_COUNT, COUNT(CASE WHEN q.Q_STATUS IN ('received', 'answering') THEN 1 END) AS NOT_DONE_COUNT, ROUND(AVG(CASE WHEN q.Q_ANSWERDATE IS NOT NULL AND q.Q_CREATEDDATE IS NOT NULL AND q.Q_ANSWERDATE >= q.Q_CREATEDDATE THEN (q.Q_ANSWERDATE - q.Q_CREATEDDATE) * 24 END), 2) AS AVG_ANSWER_HOURS FROM QUESTION q JOIN FURNITURE f ON q.F_CODE = f.F_CODE
q.F_CODE IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY q.F_CODE ) SELECT f.F_CODE AS "fCode", f.F_NAME AS "fName", NVL(qs.QUESTION_COUNT, 0) AS "questionCount", NVL(qs.DONE_COUNT, 0) AS "doneCount", NVL(qs.NOT_DONE_COUNT, 0) AS "notDoneCount", NVL(qs.AVG_ANSWER_HOURS, 0) AS "avgAnswerHours", CASE WHEN NVL(qs.QUESTION_COUNT, 0) = 0 THEN 0 ELSE ROUND(qs.DONE_COUNT / qs.QUESTION_COUNT * 100, 2) END AS "answerRate" FROM FURNITURE f LEFT JOIN QUESTION_SUMMARY qs ON f.F_CODE = qs.F_CODE
ORDER BY "questionCount" DESC

WITH OPTION_BASE AS ( SELECT o.F_CODE, COUNT(*) AS OPTION_COUNT, COUNT(CASE WHEN o.O_IMPORTANT = 'Y' THEN 1 END) AS IMPORTANT_OPTION_COUNT, SUM(NVL(o.O_COUNT, 0)) AS OPTION_STOCK_COUNT, ROUND(AVG(NVL(o.O_PRICE, 0)), 0) AS AVG_OPTION_PRICE FROM OPTIONS o JOIN FURNITURE f ON o.F_CODE = f.F_CODE
GROUP BY o.F_CODE ), OPTION_SALE AS ( SELECT co.F_CODE, COUNT(*) AS OPTION_SELECT_COUNT, SUM(NVL(co.CO_COUNT, 0)) AS OPTION_SALE_QTY, SUM(NVL(co.CO_PRICE, 0) * NVL(co.CO_COUNT, 0)) AS OPTION_EXTRA_AMOUNT FROM CART_OPTION co JOIN CART c ON co.C_CODE = c.C_CODE JOIN FURNITURE f ON co.F_CODE = f.F_CODE
c.F_STATUS = 'Y'
GROUP BY co.F_CODE ) SELECT f.F_CODE AS "fCode", f.F_NAME AS "fName", NVL(ob.OPTION_COUNT, 0) AS "optionCount", NVL(ob.IMPORTANT_OPTION_COUNT, 0) AS "importantOptionCount", NVL(ob.OPTION_STOCK_COUNT, 0) AS "optionStockCount", NVL(ob.AVG_OPTION_PRICE, 0) AS "avgOptionPrice", NVL(os.OPTION_SELECT_COUNT, 0) AS "optionSelectCount", NVL(os.OPTION_SALE_QTY, 0) AS "optionSaleQty", NVL(os.OPTION_EXTRA_AMOUNT, 0) AS "optionExtraAmount" FROM FURNITURE f LEFT JOIN OPTION_BASE ob ON f.F_CODE = ob.F_CODE LEFT JOIN OPTION_SALE os ON f.F_CODE = os.F_CODE
ORDER BY "optionSelectCount" DESC

WITH DELIVERY_SUMMARY AS ( SELECT c.F_CODE, COUNT(CASE WHEN c.F_STATUS = 'Y' THEN 1 END) AS PAY_COUNT, COUNT(CASE WHEN c.F_DSTATUS = -1 THEN 1 END) AS CANCEL_COUNT, COUNT(CASE WHEN c.F_DSTATUS = 0 THEN 1 END) AS ORDER_RECEIVED_COUNT, COUNT(CASE WHEN c.F_DSTATUS = 1 THEN 1 END) AS WAIT_SHIPMENT_COUNT, COUNT(CASE WHEN c.F_DSTATUS = 2 THEN 1 END) AS SHIPPED_COUNT, COUNT(CASE WHEN c.F_DSTATUS = 3 THEN 1 END) AS IN_DELIVERY_COUNT, COUNT(CASE WHEN c.F_DSTATUS = 4 THEN 1 END) AS DELIVERED_COUNT, COUNT(CASE WHEN c.F_DSTATUS = 5 THEN 1 END) AS CONFIRM_COUNT, ROUND(AVG(CASE WHEN c.F_STATUS = 'Y' AND c.F_DSTATUS = 5 AND c.CART_PAYDATE IS NOT NULL AND c.CART_STATUSDATE IS NOT NULL AND c.CART_STATUSDATE >= c.CART_PAYDATE THEN (c.CART_STATUSDATE - c.CART_PAYDATE) * 24 END), 2) AS AVG_CONFIRM_HOURS FROM CART c JOIN FURNITURE f ON c.F_CODE = f.F_CODE
GROUP BY c.F_CODE ), CLAIM_SUMMARY AS ( SELECT oc.F_CODE, COUNT(*) AS CLAIM_COUNT FROM ORDER_CLAIM oc JOIN FURNITURE f ON oc.F_CODE = f.F_CODE
GROUP BY oc.F_CODE ) SELECT f.F_CODE AS "fCode", f.F_NAME AS "fName", NVL(ds.PAY_COUNT, 0) AS "payCount", NVL(ds.CANCEL_COUNT, 0) AS "cancelCount", NVL(ds.ORDER_RECEIVED_COUNT, 0) AS "orderReceivedCount", NVL(ds.WAIT_SHIPMENT_COUNT, 0) AS "waitShipmentCount", NVL(ds.SHIPPED_COUNT, 0) AS "shippedCount", NVL(ds.IN_DELIVERY_COUNT, 0) AS "inDeliveryCount", NVL(ds.DELIVERED_COUNT, 0) AS "deliveredCount", NVL(ds.CONFIRM_COUNT, 0) AS "confirmCount", NVL(ds.AVG_CONFIRM_HOURS, 0) AS "avgConfirmHours", NVL(cs.CLAIM_COUNT, 0) AS "claimCount", CASE WHEN NVL(ds.PAY_COUNT, 0) = 0 THEN 0 ELSE ROUND(NVL(cs.CLAIM_COUNT, 0) / ds.PAY_COUNT * 100, 2) END AS "claimRate" FROM FURNITURE f LEFT JOIN DELIVERY_SUMMARY ds ON f.F_CODE = ds.F_CODE LEFT JOIN CLAIM_SUMMARY cs ON f.F_CODE = cs.F_CODE
ORDER BY "claimCount" DESC, "cancelCount" DESC

WITH SALES_SUMMARY AS ( SELECT c.F_CODE, COUNT(CASE WHEN c.F_STATUS = 'Y' THEN 1 END) AS PAY_COUNT, SUM(CASE WHEN c.F_STATUS = 'Y' THEN NVL(c.F_COUNT, 0) ELSE 0 END) AS SALE_QTY, SUM(CASE WHEN c.F_STATUS = 'Y' THEN NVL(c.PAY_TOTAL, 0) ELSE 0 END) AS TOTAL_PAY_AMOUNT FROM CART c JOIN FURNITURE f ON c.F_CODE = f.F_CODE
GROUP BY c.F_CODE ), REVIEW_SUMMARY AS ( SELECT r.F_CODE, COUNT(*) AS REVIEW_COUNT, ROUND(AVG(TO_NUMBER(r.FR_STAR)), 2) AS AVG_STAR FROM F_REVIEW r JOIN FURNITURE f ON r.F_CODE = f.F_CODE
r.FR_IDX > 0
GROUP BY r.F_CODE ) SELECT NVL(, 'uncategorized') AS "categoryName", COUNT(*) AS "productCount", NVL(SUM(NVL(f.F_COUNT, 0)), 0) AS "stockCount", NVL(SUM(NVL(ss.PAY_COUNT, 0)), 0) AS "payCount", NVL(SUM(NVL(ss.SALE_QTY, 0)), 0) AS "saleQty", NVL(SUM(NVL(ss.TOTAL_PAY_AMOUNT, 0)), 0) AS "totalPayAmount", NVL(SUM(NVL(f.F_VIEWCOUNT, 0)), 0) AS "viewCount", NVL(SUM(NVL(rs.REVIEW_COUNT, 0)), 0) AS "reviewCount", NVL(ROUND(AVG(rs.AVG_STAR), 2), 0) AS "avgStar" FROM FURNITURE f LEFT JOIN SALES_SUMMARY ss ON f.F_CODE = ss.F_CODE LEFT JOIN REVIEW_SUMMARY rs ON f.F_CODE = rs.F_CODE
GROUP BY NVL(, 'uncategorized') ORDER BY "totalPayAmount" DESC, "saleQty" DESC

WITH HIDE_BASE AS ( SELECT fh.F_CODE, MIN(fh.FH_CREATEDDATE) AS HIDE_DATE FROM FURNITUREHIDE fh GROUP BY fh.F_CODE ), SALES_SUMMARY AS ( SELECT c.F_CODE, COUNT(CASE WHEN c.F_STATUS = 'Y' THEN 1 END) AS PAY_COUNT, SUM(CASE WHEN c.F_STATUS = 'Y' THEN NVL(c.PAY_TOTAL, 0) ELSE 0 END) AS TOTAL_PAY_AMOUNT FROM CART c JOIN FURNITURE f ON c.F_CODE = f.F_CODE
GROUP BY c.F_CODE ) SELECT f.F_CODE AS "fCode", f.F_NAME AS "fName", f.F_PRICE AS "fPrice", f.F_COUNT AS "stockCount", CASE WHEN hb.F_CODE IS NULL THEN 'visible' ELSE 'hidden' END AS "displayStatus", hb.HIDE_DATE AS "hideDate", NVL(ss.PAY_COUNT, 0) AS "payCount", NVL(ss.TOTAL_PAY_AMOUNT, 0) AS "totalPayAmount" FROM FURNITURE f LEFT JOIN HIDE_BASE hb ON f.F_CODE = hb.F_CODE LEFT JOIN SALES_SUMMARY ss ON f.F_CODE = ss.F_CODE
ORDER BY "displayStatus", f.F_CREATEDDATE DESC

WITH PRODUCT_PAY_SUMMARY AS ( SELECT f.F_CODE, f.F_NAME, COUNT(*) AS PAY_COUNT, COUNT(CASE WHEN NVL(c.COUPON_DISCOUNT, 0) > 0 THEN 1 END) AS COUPON_USE_COUNT, SUM(NVL(c.COUPON_DISCOUNT, 0)) AS TOTAL_COUPON_DISCOUNT, COUNT(CASE WHEN NVL(c.USE_POINT, 0) > 0 THEN 1 END) AS POINT_USE_COUNT, SUM(NVL(c.USE_POINT, 0)) AS TOTAL_USE_POINT, SUM(NVL(c.PAY_TOTAL, 0)) AS TOTAL_PAY_AMOUNT, ROUND(AVG(NVL(c.PAY_TOTAL, 0)), 0) AS AVG_PAY_AMOUNT FROM FURNITURE f JOIN CART c ON f.F_CODE = c.F_CODE
c.F_STATUS = 'Y' AND NVL(c.F_DSTATUS, 0) != -1
GROUP BY f.F_CODE, f.F_NAME ) SELECT * FROM ( SELECT F_CODE AS "fCode", F_NAME AS "fName", PAY_COUNT AS "payCount", COUPON_USE_COUNT AS "couponUseCount", CASE WHEN PAY_COUNT = 0 THEN 0 ELSE ROUND(COUPON_USE_COUNT / PAY_COUNT * 100, 2) END AS "couponUseRate", NVL(TOTAL_COUPON_DISCOUNT, 0) AS "totalCouponDiscount", POINT_USE_COUNT AS "pointUseCount", CASE WHEN PAY_COUNT = 0 THEN 0 ELSE ROUND(POINT_USE_COUNT / PAY_COUNT * 100, 2) END AS "pointUseRate", NVL(TOTAL_USE_POINT, 0) AS "totalUsePoint", NVL(TOTAL_PAY_AMOUNT, 0) AS "totalPayAmount", NVL(AVG_PAY_AMOUNT, 0) AS "avgPayAmount" FROM PRODUCT_PAY_SUMMARY ORDER BY "couponUseRate" DESC, "pointUseRate" DESC, "payCount" DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM <= 10
